context_text:
SMILE INDEX: 0
WINDOW: 118.733s to 154.800s (smile at 138.733s to 139.800s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[98.525-150.730] interviewee: I was born-- I was seven months a baby. The doctor gave up. He said I would not live. So my grandmother bundled me up and took me to her hometown. And I was a raised for almost four years by my grandparents. I didn't know my parents. They came from time to time to visit us. But there were other sisters and brothers who came. So I did not.
[150.730-155.646] interviewer: They are readjusting the lens.

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
grandparents.
